results.title: Striking UITH doctors call off action over assaulted female doctor
results.description: Members of the Association of Resident Doctors, ARD, at the University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital in Kwara State have called off the strike action embarked upon in response to the assault on a female doctor by the father of a two-year-old boy who died while receiving treatment at the Paediatrics Emergency Department of the health [...] Striking UITH doctors call off action over assaulted female doctor

results.title: Iran Rebuilding Nuclear Sites? Satellite Images Show Fresh Activity At Key Facilities
results.description: Satellite images reviewed by CNN show signs of new activity at several nuclear and missile-related sites in Iran.
